executives.name: German Larrea Mota-Velasco
executives.background: Chairman of the Board since December 1999. Chief Executive Officer of Grupo Mexico (holding company) since 1994 and Chairman of the Board of Directors of Grupo Mexico since 1994. Chairman of the Board of Directors and CEO of Grupo Ferroviario Mexicano, S.A. de C.V. and Chairman of the Board of Directors and CEO of Ferrocarril Mexicano, S.A. de C.V. since 1997.

executives.name: Oscar Gonzalez Rocha
executives.background: President since December 1999 and Chief Executive Officer since October 2004. Director since November 1999. Director and Chief Executive Officer of Americas Mining Corporation since 2002. Director and President of Grupo Mexico since 2002.

executives.name: Raul Jacob
executives.background: Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer since April 2013. Previously served as Director of Investor Relations from 2000 to 2013.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Xavier Garcia de Quevedo Topete
executives.background: Vice Chairman of the Board since 2014. Director since 1999. Previously served as President of Minera Mexico from 2001 to 2014.

board_of_directors.name: German Larrea Mota-Velasco
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board of the Company since December 1999. Chairman of the Board of Directors and CEO of Grupo Mexico since 1994.

board_of_directors.name: Oscar Gonzalez Rocha
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of the Company. Director since 1999.

board_of_directors.name: Vicente Ariztegui Andreve
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2014. President and CEO of Ariztegui y Asociados, S.C. and Managing Director of Onis Vida, S.A. de C.V.

board_of_directors.name: Enrique Castillo Sanchez Mejorada
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2010. Chairman of the Board of Maxcom Telecomunicaciones, S.A.B. de C.V. and Non-executive Chairman of the Board of Banco Nacional de Mexico, S.A.

board_of_directors.name: Leonardo Contreras Lerdo de Tejada
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2014. Vice President of Administration of Grupo Mexico since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Xavier Garcia de Quevedo Topete
board_of_directors.background: Director since 1999. Vice Chairman of the Board since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Muñiz Quintanilla
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2008. Former CEO of the Mining Division of Grupo Mexico.

board_of_directors.name: Luis Miguel Palomino Bonilla
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2004. Chairman of the Board of Directors of the Peruvian Institute of Economics and Director of the Central Reserve Bank of Peru.

board_of_directors.name: Gilberto Perezalonso Cifuentes
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2002. Former CEO of Aeromexico and former CFO of Grupo Televisa.

board_of_directors.name: Carlos Ruiz Sacristan
board_of_directors.background: Director since 2004. Chairman of the Board of Sempra Infrastructure and former Secretary of Communications and Transportation of Mexico.

sources.source_description: Southern Copper Corporation DEF 14A Proxy Statement
